banner.text: Fableris is now available on Android!

news.title: Welcome to Fableris
news.text: Fableris is officially launched! 6 free stories await you, with unique universes and dozens of different endings. Have a great adventure.

news.title: 6 free stories available
news.text: Project Lazarus, The Theatre of Carcosa, The Butcher's Dreams, The Last Minutes, The Last Round and The Station of Regrets — all free, all playable right now.

news.title: StoryForge — Create your stories
news.text: The StoryForge visual editor is available for everyone. Create your own interactive story, test it, and submit it for official publication.

news.title: Horror DLC — Coming Soon
news.text: The Scottish Cemetery is coming this autumn. A story in three parts, impossible choices, and something that shouldn't exist in that cemetery on Halloween night.

news.title: DLC The Last Round — Full Career
news.text: 8 opponents, 5 narrative routes, timers at 1 second. The extended version arrives at the end of the year with a complete interactive boxing career.
